task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for BMW 3 Series (Vehicle). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $47500.00 and wholesale is $34640.00. Product features: Luxury compact sedan with 2.0L TwinPower Turbo engine and premium interior. Reference: https://www.bmwusa.com/vehicles/3-series/sedan/overview.html

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for BMW 3 Series. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying BMW 3 Series. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
